message.thinking:
We need to produce a JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), "feedback" (text), "complies" (boolean). We must analyze the provided text relative to each question.

The text: "Ievads ietver trīs daļas: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi. 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

We need to answer:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists three parts of the introduction, not the main sections of the thesis. So it does not list main sections of the thesis. So "complies": false. Feedback: mention that it only lists introduction parts, not thesis main chapters.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text gives brief descriptions of the three parts of the introduction. So yes, it briefly describes contents of each section (the introduction parts). So "complies": true. Feedback: highlight that it gives brief description of each part of introduction.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text only describes the introduction structure, not the overall thesis structure. So it's not clear what the general structure of the thesis is. So "complies": false. Feedback: mention that only introduction structure is given, not overall thesis structure.

Thus produce JSON array accordingly.
